# Copilot Instructions

Before making changes:
- read `AGENTS.md`
- read `PROJECT_STATE.md`
- read `PROJECT_RULES.md`
- read relevant docs in `docs/book/`, `docs/interop/`, and `docs/architecture/`

Rules:
- `PROJECT_STATE.md` is the final authority
- do not introduce behavior not explicitly defined in the spec
- do not document behavior unless implemented and tested
- keep changes minimal and aligned with the approved prompt stage
- keep this file consistent with `AGENTS.md` and `docs/ai/LLM_CONTRACT.md`
